reviews.review_title: Turn your Quest into a ViewMaster
reviews.review_description: What's not to like?  ViewMaster rocked, and this is as close to that as we're going to get these days without spending a whole lot more money digging up the actual article.

reviews.review_title: Nice way to view vintage stereo images
reviews.review_description: Just installed on my Quest 3.  Works really well.  Easy and fun to use.  It's great that you have the option to view in original and enhanced modes.  Looking forward to more images.  Would love to have the ability to scan and import my own collection of vintage  photos.
This is really cool to see these old photos like this but I wish there was more to look at I hope there's more updates to this app
